canonical_definition: A long-form question-answering dataset created by scraping Reddit questions and pairing them with human-written answers, used for evaluating watermark robustness in QA settings.
papers: On the Reliability of Watermarks for Large Language Models
Provable Robust Watermarking for AI-Generated Text

definitions.text: A long-form question-answering dataset created by scraping Reddit questions and pairing them with human-written answers, used for evaluating watermark robustness in QA settings.
definitions.paper: On the Reliability of Watermarks for Large Language Models
